creator: tomek@cedro.info
text: After reading the whole thread it seems in this case here problem is intermittent while for me the hub fails at connect. I considered this to be faulty hub/port. But if I could use it also on USB 3.0 port that would be great :-) Anyways I have another hub connected to USB3.0 port so not a big deal for me to have another on 2.0 port :-)
